entry.title: 6. QDialog
entry.content:
对话框

// 点击新建按钮,弹出一个对话框
connect(ui->actionNew, &QAction::triggered, this, [=](){
    // 对话框 分离
    // 模态对话框(不可以对其他窗口进行操作)
    // 非模态对话框(可以对其他窗口进行操作)

    // 模态
    QDialog newWin(this);
    newWin.resize(200, 100);
    newWin.exec();
    cout << "模态弹出" << endl;

    // 非模态对话框
    QDialog * newWin2 = new QDialog(this);
    newWin2->resize(200, 150);
    newWin2->show();
    // 为了防止内存泄漏,需要移除对象
    newWin2->setAttribute(Qt::WA_DeleteOnClose);    // 55号属性

    
    cout << "非模态对话框" << endl;



});

entry.title: 5. Add resources
entry.content:
// 资源文件

// 将文件拷贝到项目下

// 右键文件,添加新文件,QT resources file

// Open in editer 

// 通过ui可以找到所有的控件
ui->actionNew->setIcon(QIcon(":/icons/edit.png"));
ui->actionExit->setIcon(QIcon(":/icons/edit.png"));

entry.title: 4. Status
entry.content:
#include <QStatusBar>
#include <Qlabel>

// 状态栏,最多一个
QStatusBar * stBar = statusBar();
setStatusBar(stBar);
QLabel * label = new QLabel("提示信息", this);
stBar->addWidget(label);

entry.title: 3.Menu
entry.content:
#include <QMenu>

QMenuBar * bar = menuBar();
setMenuBar(bar);
// 创建菜单
QMenu * fileMenu = bar->addMenu("File");
QMenu * editMenu = bar->addMenu("Edit");
QMenu * helpMenu = bar->addMenu("Help");

// 创建菜单项
fileMenu->addAction("New file");
fileMenu->addAction("NULL");
fileMenu->addSeparator();
QAction *file_exit = fileMenu->addAction("Exit");
connect(file_exit, &QAction::triggered, this, &MainWindow::close);

QAction *help_about = helpMenu->addAction("About");
connect(help_about, &QAction::triggered, this, &MainWindow::HelpAboutFunc);

entry.title: 2. 信号与槽
entry.content:
将老师和学生创建到对象树上面

// 创建老师和学生对象
    this->teacher = new Teacher(this);
    this->student = new Student(this);

连接函数：connect()
params:
param1: 信号的发送者
param2: 发送的信号
param3: 信号的接受者
param4: 处理的槽函数

松散耦合
实现点击按钮关闭窗口的案例

connect(btn2, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::close);

entry.title: 1. Button的创建
entry.content:
1. Button的创建

#include <QPushButton>  // 引入头文件

// 第一种方式

// 创建一个按钮
QPushButton * btn = new QPushButton;
btn->show();    // 以顶层方式弹出窗口控件，也就是游离于主窗口之外
// 让btn对象依赖在MainWindow窗口中
btn->setParent(this);

// 显示文本
btn->setText("set");


// 第二种方式

// 创建第二个按钮，按照控件的大小创建窗口
QPushButton * btn2 = new QPushButton("the first", this);
// 移动btn2按钮
btn2->move(50, 0);

// 重置主窗口大小
resize(400, 300);

// 设置固定的主窗口大小
setFixedSize(400, 300);


//设置主窗口标题
setWindowTitle("第一个窗口");

entry.title: CMakeLists_md
entry.content:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8)
PROJECT(main)
find_package(OpenCV 3.4.5)
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} -std=c++11 -march=native")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -std=c++11 -march=native")
include_directories(${OpenCV_INCLUDE_DIRS})
ADD_EXECUTABLE(main /home/liuup/Desktop/cpp_test/main.cpp
                    
)
target_link_libraries(main ${OpenCV_LIBS})
find_package(Threads)
target_link_libraries(main ${CMAKE_THREAD_LIBS_INIT})
find_package(X11 REQUIRED)
include_directories(${X11_INLUCDE_DIR})
target_link_libraries(main ${X11_LIBRARIES})

entry.title: qt opencv .pro配置
entry.content:
在.pro文件中加入以下代码：

INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include
INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include/opencv
INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include/opencv2
INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include/opencv2/core
INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include/opencv2/highgui
INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include/opencv2/imgproc
INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include/opencv2/flann
INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include/opencv2/photo
INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include/opencv2/video
INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include/opencv2/features2d
INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include/opencv2/objdetect
INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include/opencv2/calib3d
INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include/opencv2/ml
INCLUDEPATH += /usr/local/include/opencv2/contrib
LIBS += `pkg-config opencv --cflags --libs`

entry.title: tasks.json
entry.content:
tasks.json

{
// 有关 tasks.json 格式的文档，请参见
    // https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=733558
    "version": "2.0.0",
    "tasks": [
        {
            "type": "shell",
            "label": "cpp build active file",
            "command": "/usr/bin/cpp",
            "args": [
                "-g",
                "${file}",
                "-o",
                "${fileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}"
            ],
            "options": {
                "cwd": "/usr/bin"
            },
            "problemMatcher": [
                "$gcc"
            ],
            "group": "build"
        },
        {
            "type": "shell",
            "label": "g++ build active file",
            "command": "/usr/bin/g++",
            "args": [
                "-g",
                "${file}",
                "-o",
                "${fileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}"
            ],
            "options": {
                "cwd": "/usr/bin"
            },
            "problemMatcher": [
                "$gcc"
            ],
            "group": "build"
        }
    ]
}
